title: Velvet Blossom Spaghetti
description: A floral and velvety Greek dish featuring spaghetti that is perfect for a date night dinner, low-sodium-friendly.
instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package instructions in boiling salted water until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil and butter over medium heat. Add minced garlic and diced onion; cook for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add low-sodium chicken broth, broccoli florets, salt, and pepper to the skillet. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for about 10-15 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Gently fold in cooked spaghetti into the vegetable mixture. Continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
Remove from heat and stir in chopped fresh basil leaves. Serve immediately.
